evidence: "I am so glad to have a show that is sci-fi and believable."
"Love the era and the actors did it justice. This is a story as old as time and if you are a romantic, you will love it."
"The plot just keeps on getting better and better! I love the twists and turns and surprises!"
"The first few episodes were great but it became too hard to follow."
"If you like action, adventure - you will love this. Harrison Ford is wonderful and the plot keeps you on the edge of your seat."
"The plot just keeps on getting better and better!"
"Everything about this film was wonderful - acting; cinematography; costume design; plot; etc."
"Great era and beautiful scenery well acted and casted."
"I have recommended this to countless people and they all have the same reaction - fabulous and cannot wait for the next one!"
"You feel as if you are actually walking around Oxford and it makes you want to travel there."
"Loved it in the theater and loved sharing it with my family."
"What a wonderful series this is - I am sure it will become a classic that future generations will enjoy for many years to come."
"I love the story line and the characters are really terrific."

summary: The user has a strong preference for sci-fi and drama genres, appreciating fast-paced narratives with high production quality. They value emotional resonance in storytelling and enjoy immersive experiences, though they show some mixed feelings towards narrative complexity.
